title: onobrychis macrorhiza
intro: Onobrychis macrorhiza, also known as Persian clover or large-flowered bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and respiratory conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis macrorhiza include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
